plugins.name: kadlekai-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for Kadlekai time tracking - manage timers, worklogs, projects, and reports. Auto-detects user timezone.

plugins.name: codemap-navigator
plugins.description: Token-efficient codebase navigation via YAML architecture maps. Codemap-aware Explore agent, /codemap-navigator:build-codemaps, /codemap-navigator:update-codemaps, /codemap-navigator:codemap-status skills, and staleness hook. Works with Rails, Django, Next.js, Express, and more.
